name: Cozy Garden Design
author: Poki
description: Cozy Garden Design is a decoration game where you can create the garden of your dreams! Arrange the layout, choose colors, and pick your favorite fences. Plant gorgeous flowers and trees, place cozy chairs and glowing lamps, and bring your garden to life with adorable animal stickers. Ready to craft your perfect peaceful paradise? How to play Cozy Garden Design? Click or tap to make the choice. Who created Cozy Garden Design? Cozy Garden Design is created by Entrevero Games. They have other amazing games on Poki: Vero Life - Dress Up & Decor , Kawaii Dress-Up , Fairy Dress-Up , Dungeons & Dress-Ups , Bearsus , Cozy Room Design , Full Metal Football , Blobby Slime Quest , CombiMon , and Stick Fighter ! How can I play Cozy Garden Design for free? You can play Cozy Garden Design for free on Poki. Can I play Cozy Garden Design on mobile devices and desktop? Cozy Garden Design can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
